title: Natural Disasters
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the term 'natural disasters'?
What are natural disasters?
What was the last natural disaster you saw on TV?
Have you ever prepared for a natural disaster?
Are there often natural disasters in your country?
Do you think natural disasters are happening more frequently in the world today?
What's the worst natural disaster in your opinion?
Do you think the world should be more concerned about natural disasters or terrorism?
What's the best natural disaster movie you've ever seen?
What's worse, natural disasters or manmade disasters?
Would you move if you lived in a country where natural disasters were common?
Why are so many natural disaster movies set in New York City?
Do you know anyone who could be called a natural disaster?
What are the worst natural disasters you can remember?
Are natural disasters acts of God?
Do you think world governments do enough to help people after natural disasters?
What would happen if a giant comet hit the Earth?
If a natural disaster hit your town, what would you do?
Why do you think natural disasters always seem to affect poor people most?
What's the worst storm you've ever been in? Where were you? What were you doing when the storm hit? Did the storm cause any damage?
What natural disasters have you (or someone you know) experienced?
How has the weather changed during your lifetime? For example, do you think it's gotten more extreme? What do you think will happen with the weather in the 21st century?
